
# Knowledge Repository

This workpackage is aimed at providing support for the integration and maintenance of AI/ML-based solutions through specific training resources.

## Resources

- [Link to funathon 1](https://aiml4os.github.io/funathon-project1/){target="_blank"}
- [Guide to creating resources for SSPCloud users](https://aiml4os.github.io/training-material-starting-pack/){target="_blank"}
- [Guide for course creators in setting up effective courses that efficiently help participants learn new skills](https://github.com/AIML4OS/training-material-starting-pack/blob/main/course_guide.md){target="_blank"}
- [Template for training material in Quatro for R users](https://aiml4os.github.io/AIML4OS-template-quarto-r/){target="_blank"}
- [Template for training material in Quatro for Python users](https://aiml4os.github.io/AIML4OS-template-quarto-python/index.html){target="_blank"}
